race.comment: JUST SWIFT (12) is yet to break through in nine runs but has been thereabouts. Placed two back then was 5 lengths away in fourth over 1600m at Seymour last time. Shapes as one of the top chances. ENZO CHARLEY (2) is a five-start maiden who was in the placings at his last two starts, finishing third at the latest appearance over 1400m at Casterton. Should camp just off the leaders and ready for 1620m now. ROUGHNUT (10) finished 4.5 lengths from the winner in fifth at his most recent appearance over 1200m at Swan Hill. Appeals as a top-four contender up in trip. NEWCOMBE (8) was a big improver second-up, when 1300m up to 1800m, and while back in trip here should be bang-on fitness-wise.
